title: Skill Discovery, Trigger Descriptions, and Boundaries · Skill Brief: Trigger Evals
summary: Make explicit and implicit invocation reliable without false positives. Planned artifact: Add and verify the agent ext trigger evals increment in a trigger evaluation dataset. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Measure missed triggers, false triggers, and competing-skill selection.
Support explicit invocation when deterministic use is required.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
